question: What was funny or strange about America at first?
answer:
There were so many good things and strange things that we never had in our country. For example, everybody is equal here, and everybody is nice to each other. If you have the money, you can get everything.

Nobody is jealous of each other, and nobody cares what you are doing. They don't gossip or talk bad about you. They treat you very nice, as if we are not any different than them.

The funny thing is, I said, "Wow!" I was so surprised because the roads are so nice and wide, with all these cars and highways.and no one hunk the horn like other
